headline: Is Tilray Brands, Inc. (TLRY) Among the 11 Best Marijuana Stocks to Buy Right Now?
summary: Tilray Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ:TLRY) is one of the 11 Best Marijuana Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 26, 2026, Tilray Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ:TLRY) reported a partnership with The Magnum Ice Cream Company to sell Popsicle-branded ready-to-drink alcoholic beverages in the United States. Tilray initially introduced Popsicle Hard beverages with 5% ABV, offering non-carbonated Hard […]
